release_notes: In Devices, selecting a model and clicking **+ Add** now **prefills the form with that model** (brand, model, specs, prices) so entering another unit of it is one step — only the serial/IMEI is left blank for you to fill.; A brand-new unit now defaults **Battery to 100%**.; Leaving **Barcode empty auto-fills it from the serial/IMEI**, so every unit is scannable without typing the code twice. (Type a barcode to override.)
